title: caltha emodorum
intro: Caltha emodorum, also known as the yellow marsh marigold, is a perennial plant species native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Caltha emodorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as colds, flu, and digestive problems.
